title: Write a ctypes delta scanner for player health
prompt:
Write a Python script halo_health_delta.py that: (1) uses ctypes to attach to MCC-Win64-Shipping.exe via OpenProcess with PROCESS_VM_READ + PROCESS_VM_WRITE + PROCESS_VM_OPERATION, (2) enumerates RW memory regions with VirtualQueryEx, (3) scans all 4-byte floats in [0.0, 100.0] on first pass, (4) exposes a rescan(new_value) function that keeps only candidates whose current value matches new_value within epsilon 0.5, (5) exposes write_all(value) that writes a float to every remaining candidate.

Requirements:
- uses ONLY ctypes + struct + sys (no pip deps)
- uses wintypes.HANDLE / wintypes.DWORD explicitly — do NOT pass raw HMODULEs as c_void_p
- has a MBI ctypes.Structure matching MEMORY_BASIC_INFORMATION
- includes the main loop with commands: i (initial scan), r N (rescan to N), w N (write N), s (status), q (quit)
- handles 2M+ candidates without blowing memory

Respond with ONLY the python code inside one fenced ```python block. No prose before or after.
